retrieved_result: BugGrabber Bug Grabber Last Updated: Aug 29, 2017 Game Version: 7.3.0Download Install2,484,663Sep 25, 2008Owner: funkydude Description Changes Earlier Versions Bug Grabber is a small addon that simply grabs all Lua errors generated by Wo W and makes them available to you through the /buggrabber slash command.
Decision_Reason: The page describes a World of Warcraft addon (BugGrabber) for capturing Lua errors, not an integrated development environment (IDE) or a list of top IDEs for software development.
